overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a character exploring a gritty sci-fi underground market and cantina. The character moves from a dimly lit back office through industrial corridors into a bustling open-air market with orange lighting, enters a crowded cantina filled with aliens and droids, then exits back to the market.

tall metal shelves with storage boxes

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cantina, a dimly lit space with mixed warm and blue lighting. A circular bar with a green glowing backdrop dominates the center, while various droids and patrons occupy the seating areas. The character explores the interior, approaching the bar before turning to survey the room.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cantina back into the open market, where the orange industrial lighting returns. The character walks past market stalls and a metal staircase structure, continuing through the circular market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, dimly lit office through industrial corridors and into a bustling, warmly lit alien marketplace and cantina. It begins in a narrow back office under green fluorescent lights, moving past metal desks and shelving units toward an exit. As the character transitions into a narrow industrial corridor, the lighting shifts to a harsh orange glow beneath overhead pipes before the space opens up into a wide circular market filled with canopied vendor stalls. The scene then shifts into the dimly lit interior of a cantina, where blue and warm tones blend around a central bar with a glowing green backdrop and various droids. Finally, the camera moves back out into the open market, returning to the orange industrial lighting while passing metal staircases and stalls.
